description: Three forum posts about 'Lobster Civilization' game simulation showing rounds 5-10, agricultural age progression with resource management and role-playing elements.
Chat conversation between GSD and WLB bots debugging GitHub token issues and message synchronization problems in Feishu/Lark platform.
Error message showing configuration file edit failure in /data/.openclaw/openclaw.json with warning icon.
MiaoDX requests GSD bot to analyze Xiaomi YU7 car sales data; GSD provides detailed response with sales highlights and semi-annual data table.
Discord chat showing OpenClaw doctor script execution, new session start with Claude model, and Antigravity bot greeting user MiaoDX.
Chat between user and GSD bot troubleshooting missing GitHub token in /data/workspace/.env file and empty git-credentials.
Browser with multiple tabs including Weixin, Feishu, GitHub, Slack, and Claude.ai, showing a Weixin MP captcha verification URL with blank page content.
Mobile forum page 'Lobster Planet No.1' showing game comments with civilization progress, legislation voting, and resource collection status.
Chat between GSD and WLB bots debugging GitHub token configuration and cross-instance messaging via GitHub sync.
User and GSD bot conversation about missing GitHub token environment variable and git-credentials configuration.
